en-US.name: Egg Weight Loss: Air Cell Log
en-US.subtitle: Incubation Humidity & Candling
en-US.promotional_text: Incubating eggs? Track each egg's weight loss against its ideal line and know exactly when to raise or lower incubator humidity. Informational tool.
en-US.description:
Is your egg losing moisture at the right rate? Egg Weight Loss: Air Cell Log plots each egg's measured weight loss against its species-specific ideal line and tells you which way to move incubator humidity - RAISE, LOWER, or hold - so you can steer every egg back on track.

An egg has to lose a set fraction of its fresh weight, evenly, from set day to internal pip. Lose too little and the chick swells; lose too much and the membrane dries out. The targets differ by species, and the right humidity move depends on fresh weight, days elapsed, days remaining, altitude, and shell type. Reading that off a spreadsheet mid-hatch is nobody's routine.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add an egg: species, fresh weight, incubator type, altitude, and set date.
2. Log today's weight and your incubator humidity.
3. You get one read - on track, or raise/lower humidity by a specific amount - plus the reason and your candling windows.

It takes 20 seconds to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Read
Each egg's measured loss compared to its ideal line, with a plain answer instead of raw grams and percentages.

Species Ideal Line
Built-in loss targets for chicken, quail, duck, goose, turkey, pigeon, and parrot species, drawn as the curve your egg should follow.

Air Cell Cross-Check
Track drawdown and internal-pip windows and cross-check your candling against the expected air-cell growth.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Track multiple eggs across multiple incubators
- Humidity guidance with a target percentage per egg
- Altitude and shell-porosity correction
- Trajectory chart: ideal line vs your measured points
- Projected end-of-incubation loss with a warning flag
- Drawdown, internal-pip, and lockdown windows
- Candling checkpoint log and notes per egg

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Egg Weight Loss: Air Cell Log provides general incubation tracking guidance based on egg physiology and species references. It is not a substitute for professional avicultural or veterinary guidance, and it does not guarantee hatch outcomes. Always confirm with candling.
